headline: Apollo Likens Risky Private Credit to Mere ‘Sprinkle’ on Cupcake
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Apollo Global Management Inc. is using a new confectionary-based metaphor to reiterate its longstanding claim that investors are vastly underestimating how much of the private-credit market carries an investment-grade rating.Most Read from BloombergFCC Near Rulings Against Disney Over ‘The View,’ TV LicensesChipmakers Bounce After Plunge to Bear-Market Edge: Markets WrapGoogle Gemini Launch Delayed as Tech Falls Short of Internal GoalsChina’s Moonshot Unveils AI Model That Narrows

headline: Apollo (APO) Completes Emerald And Questex Deals To Build A B2B Events Platform
summary: Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) has completed the acquisitions of Emerald Holding and Questex. The deals combine the two businesses into a new B2B experiential events and media platform under Apollo-managed funds. A newly appointed executive team is taking charge of the combined platform following the transaction. Apollo Global Management is extending its reach into B2B experiential events and media with the completed acquisitions of Emerald and Questex. The stock recently closed at...

headline: How Apollo-owned Michaels turned two rivals’ bankruptcies into a growth strategy
summary: The arts and crafts retailer leaning on party supplies and fabric to end years of stagnation.
